headline: Tech and finance layoffs: Oracle, Block, Morgan Stanley, Capital One headline brutal week for job losses
summary: Banking, fintech, and software firms are shedding thousands of jobs, according to recent media reports. It’s not all because of AI.

raw.headline: Tech and finance layoffs: Oracle, Block, Morgan Stanley, Capital One headline brutal week for job losses
raw.summary: Banking, fintech, and software firms are shedding thousands of jobs, according to recent media reports. It’s not all because of AI.

headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on eBay, Raises Price Target to $114
summary: Citigroup  analyst Ronald Josey   maintains eBay (NASDAQ:EBAY) with a Buy and raises the price target from $107 to $114.

raw.headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on eBay, Raises Price Target to $114
raw.summary: Citigroup  analyst Ronald Josey   maintains eBay (NASDAQ:EBAY) with a Buy and raises the price target from $107 to $114.

headline: GFA, Visa launch programme to support circular fashion entrepreneurs
summary: Global Fashion Agenda (GFA) and Visa have introduced a new initiative Visa Young Creators: Recycle the Runway, designed to support emerging designers focused on circular fashion practices.

raw.headline: GFA, Visa launch programme to support circular fashion entrepreneurs
